name: /spec refuses to emit duplicate tests when the active suite already covers the contract
command: mkdir -p tests profiles evals/specs && printf '{"name":"user can log in","command":"true","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0,"stderr_contains":[]}}\n' > evals/specs/user-can-log-in.json && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "user can log in" --profile profiles/p.yaml --tests-out tests --active-suite evals/specs --feature-id feat-x 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'duplicate_coverage' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
